allow: PowerShell($token = $env:GITHUB_TOKEN; $headers = @{ Authorization = "token $token"; Accept = "application/vnd.github.v3+json" }; $body = @{ name = "primeflow-portfolio"; private = $false; description = "PrimeFlow Solutions — Next.js portfolio with Supabase + Instagram integration" } | ConvertTo-Json; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/user/repos" -Method Post -Headers $headers -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" | Select-Object full_name, html_url, clone_url)

PowerShell($token = $env:GITHUB_TOKEN; $headers = @{ Authorization = "token $token"; Accept = "application/vnd.github.v3+json" }; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/user/repos" -Method Get -Headers $headers; $response | Where-Object { $_.name -eq "primeflow-portfolio" } | Select-Object full_name, html_url)

Bash(python scripts/with_server.py --server "cmd /c cd /d C:\\Users\\Q\\Desktop\\portfolio && npm run dev" --port 3000 --timeout 60 -- python "C:\\Users\\Q\\Desktop\\portfolio\\screenshots\\take_screenshots.py")
